title: Soul Search
content:
Soul Search
 is a simple technique used by Cultivators to read the memories of the victim.

Uses and Drawbacks
[
]

In order to use this technique, the target must first be subdued.

The risks for the target vary, at worst their soul will be destroyed and they will die, lighter cases however will at best become mentally damaged by the experience.

Risks for the user are dependent on their Cultivation level, anyone below 
Core Formation
 will run the risk of suffering the same damage as the victim when using this technique on a mortal and even at Core Formation the user will still experience a single drop in Cultivation level at the very least and as a result they can only use it three times in their lifetime.
